description: Long-abandoned packages — no commits in years, no security maintenance
review_checklist: Identify packages with no recent releases (5+ years)
Check whether maintainership is active or abandoned
Find modern replacements for abandoned tooling

ground_truth.description: Flask-Bcrypt last released 2017 (0.7.1). Functionally simple but unmaintained — switch to bcrypt directly or use passlib for password hashing. Abandonment in security-critical code is a long-term liability.
python2-secrets is a Python 2 backport of the secrets module. Python 2 reached EOL January 2020. Any Python 2 dependency in a current codebase is a major maintenance flag.
ipython 5.x is the last Python 2 compatible series — frozen since 2017. For Python 3, use ipython 8.x. Pinning 5.10.0 indicates the project may still target Python 2.
MongoKit last released 2014 — 10+ years abandoned. Replace with PyMongo + custom validation, or motor for async, or beanie/odmantic for typed models.
Flask-Genshi: Genshi templating itself is abandoned (last release 2014). The Flask integration follows. Migrate templates to Jinja2 (Flask's default).
suds (the original SOAP client): last release 2010. Replaced long ago by suds-jurko (also abandoned ~2017) and currently zeep is the maintained alternative.
